title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Radisson India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Radisson India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Radisson India! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Radisson India:
Radisson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Radisson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
